benefits.description: Immersive, epic, journey-like dream experience on the first night after a break of about a week
Wakes up alert and not tired despite sleeping 1-2 hours shorter than normal

side_effects.description: Wakes up 1 to 2 hours sooner than normal after taking DSIP; sleep is not longer

protocol_notes: User finds the effect only notable on the first night after approximately a week of abstinence. Switched to interval-based dosing (once or twice a week) to preserve the dream quality effect.
